instruction: Is Dr. Gerhardt Vössing taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?
ground_truth: No, Dr. Gerhardt Vössing is not accepting new graduate students. Note: I am not taking new Ph.D. students in the 2025-2026 admissions cycle. Students interested in microeconomic theory at Halvern are encouraged to contact Professor A. Marchetti or Professor S. Liang.

instruction: Is Nivedita Okonkwo taking prospective graduate students in the upcoming academic year?
ground_truth: Yes, Nivedita Okonkwo is accepting prospective graduate students. Note: I am accepting Ph.D. students for Fall 2026. Prospective students should apply through the Halvern CS graduate program and mention my name in their statement. I cannot respond to individual inquiry emails before applications are reviewed.
